summary: codex §9 review of tooling port (commit 31a73401): 1x[P2], zero convergence/domain findings
body: codex gpt-5.5 reviewed the full diff. Only finding: [P2] ledgerwatch.py:139 rotation heuristic misses a same-first-line + same-or-larger-size in-place rewrite. Zero findings on the port's own concerns (no memex domain leak, no dangling command refs, .gitignore correct, agent-def rules consistent, no parallel system).

summary: override: accept codex [P2] as an upstream verbatim-tool property; no fix-N (converge, don't fork)
body: The P2 is a pre-existing characteristic of the verbatim-copied memex ledgerwatch tool (107 tests green incl. test_jsonl_inplace_rewrite_same_size_detected). Patching here would fork the tool from its memex source of truth, violating the converge-don't-fork directive. Recorded for the tool's upstream owner (memex) instead. Same posture for the illustrative dev/steward/DESIGN.md reference in the verbatim ledgerwrite README. Neither is a BLOCK.
